update:
Announcing the General Availability (GA) release of the Places Aggregate API. See the  Release Notes  for information about this release and for all other releases. 
 If you are a new user, see  Set up your Google Cloud project  to start the installation process.

To better align with the product's functionality and value, we changed the product name from  Places Insights API  to  Places Aggregate API .  
 Note:  None of the API methods or objects were renamed so your code should continue to work without change.

Places Insights API 
 Announcing the General Availability (GA) release of the  Places Insights API . See the  Release Notes  for information about this release and for all other releases. 
 If you are a new user, see  Set Up in the Google Cloud Console  to start the installation process.
For information about how Google calculates pricing and billing for the Places Insights API, see  Places Insights API Usage and Billing .

The Preview release of the Places Insights API is now available. For information about this release, and for all previous releases, see the  Release Notes  or subscribe to the Release Notes  XML feed . 
 To start the installation process, see  Set Up in the Google Cloud Console .
